common.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

hero.title: Protect Patient Privacy with Intelligent De-Identification
hero.subtitle: Transform clinical text containing sensitive patient data into fully anonymized, HIPAA-compliant records — powered by Microsoft Presidio.

features.title: Protect Patient Privacy
features.subtitle: Enterprise-grade tools for healthcare data anonymization

detection.title: Intelligent PII Detection
detection.description: Automatically detect names, SSNs, addresses, diagnoses, and 20+ other PII entity types using Microsoft Presidio's ML-powered analyzer.

anonymization.title: Flexible Anonymization
anonymization.description: Replace, redact, hash, or encrypt sensitive entities. Configure anonymization strategies per entity type for granular control.

synthetic.title: Synthetic Data Generation
synthetic.description: Generate realistic replacement data that preserves statistical properties of the original dataset for research and testing.

audit.title: Full Audit Trail
audit.description: Every de-identification operation is logged with timestamps, user details, and transformation records for compliance reporting.

compliance.title: Built for Compliance
compliance.subtitle: Meet the strictest healthcare data regulations

hipaa.title: HIPAA Safe Harbor
hipaa.description: Remove all 18 HIPAA identifiers automatically. Our system maps directly to PHI categories defined in 45 CFR § 164.514(b).

gdpr.title: GDPR Article 89
gdpr.description: Pseudonymization and anonymization techniques aligned with GDPR research exemptions and data minimization principles.

hitech.title: HITECH Act
hitech.description: Breach notification compliance and enhanced privacy protections for electronic health information.

about.title: About Clinical Data Studio
about.subtitle: Built by healthcare data engineers, for healthcare data engineers
about.description: Clinical Data Studio solves the real challenge of working with sensitive patient data in research and development environments. We combine the power of Microsoft Presidio with an intuitive interface to make HIPAA compliance achievable for every healthcare organization.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your use case...
form.success: Thank you! We'll be in touch soon.
